ITEM.name: Training Dagger
ITEM.desc: The Training dagger.

ITEM.name: Kukri Dagger
ITEM.desc: The dagger of kukri.

ITEM.name: Cursed Dagger
ITEM.desc: This dagger is said to be used to kill a spirt and it's curse was sealed in this dagger.

ITEM.name: Prince's Dagger
ITEM.desc: Used by a Abran Prince, this dagger is quick enough to slice the opponent to pieces.

ITEM.name: Golden Dagger
ITEM.desc: Made from the finest gold in all republic, hunters from all over the world are seeking this magnificent dagger. However, it's heavy.

ITEM.name: Ancient Dagger
ITEM.desc: Ancient dagger used by assassins during the great war of astra.

ITEM.name: Training Katana
ITEM.desc: The training katana.

ITEM.name: Blood Blade
ITEM.desc: A man's weapon is mearly an extension of themself.

ITEM.name: Desert Winds
ITEM.desc: This legendary scimitar is said to be able to control the desert sand storms.

ITEM.name: God Save The Queen
ITEM.desc: A sword from a distant land, it has many protective magics bestowed upon it.

ITEM.name: Gaia
ITEM.desc: Legend claims this sword was formed during the creation of the planet.

ITEM.name: Devils Edge
ITEM.desc: This blade was said to cast the image of the Devil himself.

ITEM.name: Icile Scythe
ITEM.desc: Ice scythe, the deep ends of the arctic.

ITEM.name: Void Scythe
ITEM.desc: The darken nightmare of the fears, scythe of the darkness.

ITEM.name: Spike Sword
ITEM.desc: The spike sword that is made with sharp ends to cut through anything, also made by someone frmo RaGEZONE.

ITEM.name: Dark Void Blade
ITEM.desc: The blade of darknes feels within your inner soul.

ITEM.name: Yatagan
ITEM.desc: Ezio's sword from Assasin's Creed: Revelation.

ITEM.name: Buster Blade (Single)
ITEM.desc: The seperated part of Cloud's Buster Blade from Final Fantasy VII: Advent Children.

ITEM.name: Buster Blade
ITEM.desc: The blade that has all of the parts put into one sword, Buster Blade.

ITEM.name: Rukia's Katana
ITEM.desc: Rukia's katana from Bleach.

ITEM.name: Zangetsu
ITEM.desc: Ichigo's sword from Bleach.

ITEM.name: Rebellion
ITEM.desc: The sword that is held by Dante from Devil May Cry series.

ITEM.name: Red Queen
ITEM.desc: The sword held by Nero from Devil May Cry 4.

ITEM.name: Yamato
ITEM.desc: The sword from Devil May Cry series with a old demon that held this katana.

ITEM.name: Dragon Buster
ITEM.desc: The blade that can kill any Dragon or Dragoon, Legend of Dragoon.

ITEM.name: Two-Across Keyblade
ITEM.desc: The keyblade held by Roxas from Kingdom Hearts 2 Final Mix.

ITEM.name: Koden Kodachi
ITEM.desc: A Kodachi designed by the same legendary swordsman that crafted the koden dagger.

ITEM.name: Darkness Kodachi
ITEM.desc: The darkness of this blade will take you down the wrong path for the greatest strength.

ITEM.name: Flesh Kodachi
ITEM.desc: A man's weapon is mearly an extension of themself.

ITEM.name: Ancient Kodachi
ITEM.desc: Acient Kodachi of the 8014 War used by the four greatest assassins.

ITEM.name: Buster Blade (Part 1)
ITEM.desc: Buster Blade part 1 out of 3.

ITEM.name: Buster Blade (Part 2)
ITEM.desc: Buster Blade part 2 out of 3.

ITEM.name: Buster Blade (Part 3)
ITEM.desc: Buster Blade part 3 out of 3.

ITEM.name: Skeleton Large Sword
ITEM.desc: Skeleton large sword stolen from Hades.

ITEM.name: Fire Large Sword
ITEM.desc: Fire large sword crafted from Rare dragon skin.

ITEM.name: Gods Large Sword
ITEM.desc: Large sword used during the battle of gods.

ITEM.name: Perfect Large Sword
ITEM.desc: Perfectly crafted large sword only one of its kind.

ITEM.name: Gears of War Revolver
ITEM.desc: Gears of War Revolver

ITEM.name: Gears of War Revolver x2
ITEM.desc: Gears of War Revolver

ITEM.name: Mercenary
ITEM.desc: Made by RevolutioN frmo RaGEZONE

ITEM.name: Mercenary x2
ITEM.desc: Made by RevolutioN frmo RaGEZONE

ITEM.name: Navy Tiffany
ITEM.desc: Made by RevolutioN frmo RaGEZONE

ITEM.name: Navy Tiffany x2
ITEM.desc: Made by RevolutioN frmo RaGEZONE

ITEM.name: Lesser Dark Sub-Machine Gun x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Lesser Dark SMG still has enough darkness to give you the strength you need to win.

ITEM.name: Pirate Sub-Machine Gun x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Pirate SMG used during the pirate's and astra warriors.

ITEM.name: Plasma Sub-Machine Gun x2
ITEM.desc: (Dual Wield) Plasma SMG used during the war of 8014, said to be great at close combat.

ITEM.name: Silenced SMG (ODST)
ITEM.desc: Halo 3: ODST smg.

ITEM.name: Silenced SMG (ODST) x2
ITEM.desc: Halo 3: ODST smg.

ITEM.name: Training Shotgun
ITEM.desc: The training shotgun.

ITEM.name: Training Shotgun V.2
ITEM.desc: The training shotgun v.2

ITEM.name: Breaker 10
ITEM.desc: A secret shotgun used amongst a private group unlisted to today .

ITEM.name: Punisher SG-I
ITEM.desc: Punisher shotgun used during the great 8014 war it was said to have helped win the war.

ITEM.name: Punisher SG-II
ITEM.desc: Punisher shotgun used during the great 8014 war it was said to have helped win the war.

ITEM.name: Saw-Off Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Saw-off shotgun.

ITEM.name: Saw-Off Shotgun x2
ITEM.desc: Saw-off shotgun.

ITEM.name: Long Barrel Shotgun
ITEM.desc: The long double barrel shotgun.

ITEM.name: Gnasher Shotgun
ITEM.desc: The shotgun from Gears of War.

ITEM.name: Weatherby Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Whoa, boom, shotgun.

ITEM.name: Mossberg Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Whoa, boom, shotgun.

ITEM.name: Striker Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Whoa, boom, shotgun.

ITEM.name: Cracken Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Re-model by Jirachi (RaGEZONE), but originally from `Styx

ITEM.name: Breaker G6
ITEM.desc: Whoa, boom, shotgun.

ITEM.name: Spongebob Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Whoa, boom, shotgun.

ITEM.name: FNH Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Whoa, boom, shotgun.

ITEM.name: Mossberg 500 Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Whoa, boom, shotgun.

ITEM.name: Training Rifle
ITEM.desc: The training rifle.

ITEM.name: Mecha Rifle
ITEM.desc: Mecha rifle one of the most powerful rifles to date and it doesnt look bad eaiter.

ITEM.name: Rifle Of Judgement
ITEM.desc: Rifle of judgement was granted to the high priest warriors of Axium to cast judgement to all that mean harm.

ITEM.name: Wood Rifle
ITEM.desc: Wooden rifle, Watch out it might get to hot and catch fire.

ITEM.name: Veterans Rifle
ITEM.desc: Veterans rifle was custom built for the better marksman.

ITEM.name: Golden Rifle
ITEM.desc: Golden rifle was created with an extra clip for the great war of 8014.

ITEM.name: AUG Rifle
ITEM.desc: Call of Duty: Black Ops rifle.

ITEM.name: CM901 Rifle
ITEM.desc: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare rifle.

ITEM.name: UMP45
ITEM.desc: Modern Warfare gun.

ITEM.name: G36C Rifle
ITEM.desc: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare rifle.

ITEM.name: Hammer Bust
ITEM.desc: Gears of War rifle.

ITEM.name: Lancer
ITEM.desc: Gears of War gun..

ITEM.name: Enforcer
ITEM.desc: Made by RevolutioN or `Styx, can't seem to remember.

ITEM.name: (Sniper) PSG
ITEM.desc: Made by `Styx from RaGEZONE, also a weapon from CoD: Black Ops.

ITEM.name: (Sniper) Barrett 50 Cal
ITEM.desc: A sniper from Modern Warfare series.

ITEM.name: (Sniper) HK-SL8
ITEM.desc: A sniper from Resident Evil 4.

ITEM.name: (Sniper) M1932
ITEM.desc: A sniper from Resident Evil 4.

ITEM.name: (Sniper) L96A1 Black Camo
ITEM.desc: Call of Duty: Black Ops series weapon.

ITEM.name: (Sniper) MK14 Rifle
ITEM.desc: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare series weapon.

ITEM.name: (Sniper) Blue MK14 Rifle
ITEM.desc: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare series weapon.

ITEM.name: Training MachineGun
ITEM.desc: The training machinegun.

ITEM.name: Fighter MG
ITEM.desc: With the fighters of astra getting stronger so did theirs.

ITEM.name: Red Ultimate MachineGun
ITEM.desc: Plasma MachineGun was created during the great war of 8014.

ITEM.name: Ring of Agony
ITEM.desc: None other than the less, this is a common use for survival in the wilderness.

ITEM.name: Ring of Sacriface
ITEM.desc: The ring of sacriface, even though it takes a part of your life, it is worth to die for.

ITEM.name: Ring of Eternal Legacy
ITEM.desc: This ring is the master art living a legend.

ITEM.name: Barbarian's Ring
ITEM.desc: The ring that was a barbarian, people are crazy for this ring.

ITEM.name: Death Wish Ring
ITEM.desc: This is something you guys would die for. We mean it, to die for.

ITEM.name: Knight's Ring
ITEM.desc: Once was the ring from a knight that guard the castle of the temples of Legend.

ITEM.name: Knight of the Guardian Soul
ITEM.desc: Amazed by those who holds this gains the power of the Guardian's soul and strength.

ITEM.name: Enhanced Experience Ring
ITEM.desc: The ring that gives your 10 % bonus exp points and bounty.

ITEM.name: Enhanced Experience Ring (Level 2)
ITEM.desc: Extra enhanced experience ring that gives your an extra 20% bonus for exp and bounty.

ITEM.name: Almighty Enhancement Chance
ITEM.desc: The ring that gives your 50% bonus on exp and bounty points.

ITEM.name: STR:ZITEM_NAME_525007
ITEM.desc: The excellent ring that will give you 65% bonus (exp and bounty points).

ITEM.name: The Scaciface of Honor
ITEM.desc: The ring that will require you to give up 15 points of your health in order to get a 75% bonus.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Energy Sword
ITEM.desc: (VIP) The energy sword from all of the halo games.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Bankai
ITEM.desc: The katana from Bleach, also known as Bankai, Ichigo's katana.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Kingdom Key
ITEM.desc: The key to open all of the doors into Kingdom Hearts. Sora is the main keyblade chosen one.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Riku's Keyblade
ITEM.desc: Riku's keyblade from Kingdom Hearts 2.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Oathkeeper
ITEM.desc: The key chain that was given to Sora that made this keyblade to this.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Oblivion
ITEM.desc: The keyblade of the heartless infused with Sora's heart to form the Oblivion to another world.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Dragon Sword
ITEM.desc: Held by the Dragon Linage, Ryu Hayabusa, this sword can do most of all the things can image.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Plasma Rifle
ITEM.desc: The alien weapon that is from all of the Halo series.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Plasma Rifle x2
ITEM.desc: The alien weapon that is from all of the Halo series.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Spiker
ITEM.desc: Halo 3 smg weapon.

ITEM.desc: Halo 3 smg weapon.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Needler
ITEM.desc: Halo 3 alien weapon.

ITEM.desc: Halo 3 alien weapon.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Hello Kitty Shotgun
ITEM.desc: OMGWTFBBQ! HELLO KITTY SHOTGUN!

ITEM.name: (VIP) 1866 YellowBoy
ITEM.desc: The yellowboy shotgun back in the 18th century.

ITEM.desc: The colored shotgun of InfectiveGunz, also V.I.P.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Carbine
ITEM.desc: The alien weapon from Halo 2 and Halo 3.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Battle Rifle
ITEM.desc: The human weapon from Halo 2 and Halo 3.

ITEM.name: (VIP) ACR
ITEM.desc: The sniper that is from the modern times such as Modern Warfare and Modern Warfare 2.

ITEM.name: (VIP) SCAR
ITEM.desc: The sniper that is from the modern times such as Modern Warfare and Modern Warfare 2.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Halo Reach Sniper
ITEM.desc: The sniper that is from Halo: Reach with a high bullet damage against enemies.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Revenger
ITEM.desc: Customized sniper that was made with specialty bullets that can pierce through anything.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Arctic Wolf
ITEM.desc: The sniper that is specialty made in the winter season.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Halo 3 Sniper
ITEM.desc: The sniper that is from Halo 3 with a high bullet damage against enemies.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Predator
ITEM.desc: The predator missile striking from the sky.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Enlightenment Pouch
ITEM.desc: A ring that gives the power of light at a certain level.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Zombie's Corpse
ITEM.desc: The corpse of a infected zombie is now inside you.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Lord Infectious
ITEM.desc: The main resource of this cause is by the lord itself.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Bloody Stain
ITEM.desc: Fill yourself with the love of red in you, bloody monster.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Death Corpse
ITEM.desc: You will not die by touching it, you'll die if you don't succeed it's purpose.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Demonic Power
ITEM.desc: The power of the demon that enables the evil in you.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Devil's Ring
ITEM.desc: The devil has granted you with his ring, you will need to carry on his wishes.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Darken Wishes
ITEM.desc: These wishes give you the ability to do anything as you please.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Dying Focus
ITEM.desc: Either you die without any purpose or you die trying to succeed.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Final Destination - Infectious
ITEM.desc: The stage where you become greater than anything and anyone in the world. Nothing can stop you.

ITEM.name: (VIP) L4D HP Kit
ITEM.desc: First Aid Med Kit from Left 4 Dead and Left 4 Dead 2.

ITEM.name: (VIP) L4D AP Kit
ITEM.desc: First Aid Med Kit from Left 4 Dead and Left 4 Dead 2.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Health-X
ITEM.desc: Highly rate of healing your health.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Armor-X
ITEM.desc: Highly rate of healing your armor.

ITEM.name: (VIP) Ammo-X
ITEM.desc: A good magazine for your ammunition.

ITEM.name: (Event) Starseeker (Mog!)
ITEM.desc: Final Fantasy XIII-2, Serah's weapon, known as Mog, that transform into a weapon for her.

ITEM.name: (Event) BlazeEdge Sword
ITEM.desc: The sword that was held by Lightning Farron from Final Fantasy XIII. It can change into a gun as well.

ITEM.name: (Event) Gunblade
ITEM.desc: Final Fantasy XIII-2. Lightning's Guardian Sword.

ITEM.name: (Event) Dual Saber
ITEM.desc: The saber that has two end lightsaber. Darth Maul weilds this in the first episode of Star Wars.

ITEM.name: (Event) Blue Saber
ITEM.desc: The saber that has two end lightsaber. Anakin Skywalker weilds this in the second and third episode of Star Wars.

ITEM.name: (Event) Red Saber
ITEM.desc: The saber that has two end lightsaber. Darth Vader weilds this in the 3rd-6th episode of Star Wars.

ITEM.name: (Event) Stakeout Shotgun
ITEM.desc: The shotgun from Call of Duty: Blackops.

ITEM.name: (Event) Halo 3 Shotgun
ITEM.desc: The shotgun from Halo series.

ITEM.name: (Event) M1014 Shotgun
ITEM.desc: The shotgun from Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2.

ITEM.name: (Event) SPAS-12
ITEM.desc: The shotgun from Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 2.

ITEM.desc: Event shotgun

ITEM.name: (Event) Halo Reach DMR
ITEM.desc: Halo Reach human weapon, the DMR.

ITEM.desc: Halo Reach alien weapon, the Needle Rifle.

ITEM.name: (Event) Dragunov Sniper
ITEM.desc: The sniper that is from the modern times such as Call of Duty: Blackops and Modern Warfare.

ITEM.name: (Event) Red MK14 Sniper
ITEM.desc: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare series weapon.

ITEM.name: (Event) Optimus Prime
ITEM.desc: Optimus Prime: Autobots, roll out.

ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Painpills from Left 4 Dead and Left 4 Dead 2.

ITEM.desc: The pipebomb from Left 4 Dead and Left 4 Dead 2.

ITEM.name: (Event) Molotov
ITEM.desc: Molotov, meant to burn the hell out of you. Muahaha!

ITEM.name: (Premium) Archfield Blade
ITEM.desc: Held by the Black Spider Clan, Genshi, is the blade of the archfield that is cursed as well.

ITEM.name: (Premium) Zangkai
ITEM.desc: The new katana of Ichigo's sword.

ITEM.name: (Premium) Infectious Shots
ITEM.desc: The shotgun that is made with very many specialty. Also one of the best custom shotguns.

ITEM.name: (Premium) Model 1887
ITEM.desc: The shotgun from Call of Duty: Modern Warfare series.

ITEM.name: (Premium) Starseeker (Bow)
ITEM.desc: Final Fantasy XIII-2, Starseeker Bow.

ITEM.name: (Premium) Intervention Sniper
ITEM.desc: The sniper that is from the modern times such as Call of Duty: Blackops and Modern Warfare.

ITEM.name: (Premium) L4D Painpills
ITEM.desc: Pain pills from Left 4 Dead and Left 4 Dead 2.

ITEM.name: (Premium) Claymore
ITEM.desc: The claymore that can blow the fuck out of others without noticing it was there. This item was made by a guy on RaGEZONE (forgot the username), he used 3D MAX to make this.

ITEM.name: (Premium) Optimus Prime
ITEM.desc: Optimus Prime: Autobots, roll out.
